# Issue #7: Inventory service

## Description
Implement inventory management service for tracking and managing material quantities.

## Tasks
- [x] Implement inventory query (get all, get by product)
- [x] Implement reserve materials function
- [x] Implement consume materials function
- [x] Implement release reservation function (on order cancel)
- [x] Implement manual inventory adjustment
- [x] Prevent oversubscription (cannot reserve more than available)
- [x] Add warehouse capacity checks

## Acceptance Criteria
- Materials can be reserved for released orders
- Consumption updates inventory correctly
- Cannot over-reserve or over-consume
- Warehouse capacity enforced

## Phase
Phase 2 - Core Simulation
